title: Dictionary Web App
description: A responsive dictionary web app built with React, Tailwind CSS, and modern accessibility patterns. Featuring audio pronunciation playback, synonym navigation, dark mode, and a custom data layer with normalized API responses and multi-state error handling.

title: Frontend Quiz App
description: A responsive, interactive quiz app built with React, modern CSS, and semantic HTML. It features full keyboard accessibility, light-dark mode theming, and an efficient and thoughtful component structure.

title: GitSeeker
description: A GitHub profile search tool built with React and Tailwind CSS, where accessibility was treated as a primary architectural decision. Features semantic HTML throughout, ARIA-compliant interactive elements, and a theme toggle that respects the user's OS preference.

title: Responsive Menu with Cart
description: A responsive shopping cart application built with React, semantic HTML, and Tailwind CSS that emphasizes clean component architecutre, accessible design, and polished user interactions.
